rag_rules: Merge each AGREE annex into the owner scope that matches its content: component-type contract content stays on a component type, and implementation-only bindings stay on an implementation.
Only fuse an annex into a scope where all referenced symbols are visible; do not move subcomponent-path or implementation-only references into a component-type scope.
generic_rules: Preserve the existing AADL architecture while inserting the annex; do not change subcomponents, connections, features, properties, or ownership to accommodate the merge.
Keep the annex additive and scoped to one owner; avoid relocating declarations across type and implementation scopes for convenience.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Preserve the annex wrapper as a complete AGREE block: annex agree {** ... **};
If the owner is an implementation, place the annex after the structural declarations it depends on.
anti_patterns: Do not insert component-type contract content into an implementation, or implementation-only bindings into a component type.
Do not rename, delete, or restructure existing model elements just to make annex placement work.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
type scope range assumption and guarantee
